prompt:
Subject:
Summer water splash

Person/Expression:
A woman in her 20s. Natural skin texture with a bright ivory-beige tone and a hint of healthy pink. Summer sunlight highlights the cheeks, tip of the nose, shoulders, and collarbones, preserving fine skin texture without excessive airbrushing. Pale rose-pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eyeshadow, long thin eyelashes, natural undereye bags, soft light-brown eyebrows, and sheer pink-beige lip gloss. One eye winking, the other with a small, clear catchlight. Smiling happily toward the camera.

Clothing/Pose:
Light milk-tea ash-brown hair with thin see-through bangs, face-framing layers, and medium-long length to below the shoulders. Ends are loosely curled inward, swaying slightly in the sea breeze. Fine highlights, soft shine, and natural stray hairs are carefully depicted. A large red ribbon on top of the head. A pink sporty swim top and glossy orange swim shorts. Bending slightly at the knees in the shallows, leaning the upper body toward the camera. Gripping a green, orange, and purple water gun with her right hand, spraying water toward the camera. The left arm is extended to the right side of the screen for balance.

Background/Light:
Clear turquoise blue sea, white sandy beach, palm trees and deep greenery on the far right, with low mountains and rocky areas in the distance. A midsummer day with white clouds in a blue sky. Strong sun shines from the upper left front, brightly illuminating the left side of the face, shoulders, hair, wet skin, and water droplets. Shadows fall softly toward the bottom right, with reflected light from the sea surface faintly lifting the shadows under the chin and neck. Large splashes and scattered droplets in the foreground.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical 2:3 aspect ratio. Low camera position near the water surface, a close-up portrait with a slightly wide-angle feel. The water gun is prominent in the foreground, with the face positioned slightly above the center. The water spray creates a diagonal line from the bottom left toward the face. Close-up composition centered on the upper body, with feet partially hidden by splashes. Focus on the face and water gun; the background sea and palm trees are lightly blurred.

Texture/Style:
Realistic summer photography. Emphasis on the vivid blue sky and sea, healthy sunlight, natural reflections on wet skin, transparency of water droplets, and fine strands of hair. Refreshing like a bright seaside snapshot rather than a magazine spread. Skin is smooth but not plastic-like. Colors are high-saturation but not overexposed, with clean and light contrast.

Negative:
Unnatural face or gaze, extra or missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, poor contact with the water gun, floating objects, unnatural gravity, splashes inconsistent with water flow, shadows mismatched with light source, excessive skin retouching, plastic skin, unwanted people, garbled text, logos, watermarks."}
